Respondents' Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgement On The Pleadongs In Respinse To Petition To Quiet Title To Real Property; Request For Judicial Notice; Declaration Of Jerry Threet.
Off Calendar Mar-25-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jerry Threet for City and County of San Francisco (CCSF). Donald Mah for Edmund King.

The Court stated that the correct place to attack the judgment was in the civil case. The tentative ruling stands: 1) CCSF's Motion for Judgment on the Pleadings as to the Petition to Quiet Title - Grant. 2) CCSF's request to exceed page limit - Grant. 3) CCSF's request for judicial notice - Grant. Mr. Threet is to prepare the order.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.
